description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form, set on a rectangular plot with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The front facade features large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a prominent entryway, flanked by vertical wooden or metal slats for added texture. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and gray, with some green landscaping visible on the roof and around the entrance. The side elevations have smaller, regularly spaced windows, while the rear is more minimal with limited fenestration. The roof includes a small green section, possibly a rooftop garden or terrace. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with outdoor space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large front windows, white and gray exterior, and a landscaped entryway.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the landscaped walkway.
description_view_1: Side and partial rear view highlighting the flat roof, green rooftop area, and smaller side windows.
description_view_2: Rear and opposite side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the building's rectangular footprint.
description_view_3: Direct front and top-down view emphasizing the entryway, large front windows, and the paved path.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and smaller side windows
